textBox.richText: QUICK LIST of CHANGES (see the CHANGES file in the distribution for a complete and detailed list) NEW FEATURES The main feature of this release is the availability of a self installer for the Windows version and a pre-compiled version for MacOS. This should significantly ease the installation process. Testing CAPH should now be as simple as 1. Click on the installer program 2. Launch CAPH 3. Select project in the example directory 4. Click on Dot / Sim / Systemc / Vhdl button(s) ! The CAPH Primer tutorial has also been completely rewritten. It now includes three distinct and complementary parts : one dedicated to the language itself, one describing the GUI and one describing the command-line interface to the toolset. The section describing the command-line interface has been rewritten to show the use of the [caphmake] utility.
